content.inputFormat: First line contain number **T** — number of testcases. **T** tests follow. First line of each testcase contain two integers **n** and **m**. Next line contain **n** integers **a[1], a[2], ..., a[n]**. Next line contain **m** integers **b[1], b[2], ..., b[m]**.
content.outputFormat: For each testcase print expected number of inversions.
